description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the official security scanning templates for Dependency Scanning, Secret Detection, SAST, and IaC SAST. Add four jobs named dependency_scanning, secret_detection, sast, and iac-sast, each with an empty before_script and no explicit needs, running in the default test stage provided by the templates. Use the include keyword to import Jobs/Dependency-Scanning.latest.gitlab-ci.yml, Jobs/Secret-Detection.latest.gitlab-ci.yml, Jobs/SAST.latest.gitlab-ci.yml, and Jobs/SAST-IaC.latest.gitlab-ci.yml. No custom image, variables, caches, artifacts, or rules are defined, so the jobs inherit the defaults from the templates.
